data.content: Implementation review follow-up complete. Commit a8713992e14f3848ce6851f8b7a5fdf27972b4e8 fixes the manual approval harness review feedback: Claude temporary settings mutation now sets the selected agent approvalMode to prompt; OpenCode known-blocker detection recognizes permission.asked in either approval-request-visibility.ts or the split opencode-approval-request.ts extractor. Added node --dry-helper-checks coverage for the Claude prompt mutation and split OpenCode extractor heuristic. Gates passed: bun install --frozen-lockfile; node help; bash syntax; node dry-helper checks; shell help/restore path; codex/claude/opencode blocked dry paths; git diff --check; bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build.
